title: Fabric IQ
description: Showcase Fabric IQ: build a semantic ontology over this industry's data spanning a Lakehouse (static entities) and an Eventhouse (time-series), bind it to real tables, and expose it through a Fabric Data Agent for natural-language, context-aware analytics over your business entities and relationships.
prerequisites: Paid Fabric capacity (F2+) for the data agents — Trial/FT1 SKUs are not supported
Fabric IQ / Ontology (preview) enabled in the tenant
Data agent item type + Copilot/AI enabled in the tenant
